title: Every time period move item to another board
excerpt:
Hey, 
Is it possible to make every quarter all the items of the board move to another board? 
Thanks.

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

Is it possible to make every quarter all the items of the board move to another board?

Thanks.

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @eranggg , you could set a column date up as “Next Quarter”. Then create an automation for when “Next Quarter” arrives move item to another board.

image1186×340 12.9 KB

posts.author: eranggg (eran)
posts.cookedHtml:
But I want to automate it.

The way you mentioned, I need to change the date column every quarter for all my items.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @eranggg - it’s more about how you set the next quarter date on your items in the first place? As per your question, you want the item to move to a different board when the date arrives, so there is no need to set the date to the next quarter?

Are you looking for a way to automate the next quarter date when an Item is created or is this something you manually set?

Thanks,
Mark
